content:
Ever planted seeds at the wrong time and watched them die? Me too. That's why I built PlantingCalendar.net - a free tool that tells you exactly what to plant every single day based on your climate zone.

Built with AI coding tools in about 4 hours. 365 pages, each with unique planting instructions. Static site on Cloudflare Pages, zero server cost.

Free, no sign-up.
